markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Address SpecterOps' concerns about content accuracy and review burden.](https://fathom.video/share/h4vxyzK8u2zrHXAscHgmfVbBcxxtuDjT?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Problem:** The 5 blogs/week volume is unmanageable for SpecterOps' PMM team, who must review all content due to accuracy concerns (e.g., the IDDR blog's angle was misaligned).](https://fathom.video/share/h4vxyzK8u2zrHXAscHgmfVbBcxxtuDjT?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [**Solution:** Extend the calibration phase with a lower content volume and a new pricing tier. This allows for more granular feedback to improve accuracy before scaling.](https://fathom.video/share/h4vxyzK8u2zrHXAscHgmfVbBcxxtuDjT?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [**Strategic Shift:** SpecterOps will pivot content to target CISOs (budget holders) over practitioners, aligning with a key 2025 initiative and potentially simplifying calibration.](https://fathom.video/share/h4vxyzK8u2zrHXAscHgmfVbBcxxtuDjT?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Unmanageable Review Burden

  - [The 5 blogs/week volume creates an unmanageable review burden for SpecterOps' PMM team.](https://fathom.video/share/h4vxyzK8u2zrHXAscHgmfVbBcxxtuDjT?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [**Why:** Content accuracy is a major concern, requiring full review of all drafts.](https://fathom.video/share/h4vxyzK8u2zrHXAscHgmfVbBcxxtuDjT?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [**Example:** The IDDR blog's angle was misaligned with SpecterOps' view, posing a risk if published.](https://fathom.video/share/h4vxyzK8u2zrHXAscHgmfVbBcxxtuDjT?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** The AI model struggles with SpecterOps' niche and the vertical's maturity, yielding inaccurate outputs.](https://fathom.video/share/h4vxyzK8u2zrHXAscHgmfVbBcxxtuDjT?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [**Internal Context:** The PMM team was brought into calibration mid-process, lacking dedicated resources. Meshach will work with Luke (Director of PMM) to secure team bandwidth.](https://fathom.video/share/h4vxyzK8u2zrHXAscHgmfVbBcxxtuDjT?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)

### Solution: Extended Calibration & Strategic Pivot

  - [**Proposal:** Extend the calibration phase with a lower content volume and a new pricing tier.](https://fathom.video/share/h4vxyzK8u2zrHXAscHgmfVbBcxxtuDjT?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This allows for more granular feedback, improving accuracy before scaling to the full volume.](https://fathom.video/share/h4vxyzK8u2zrHXAscHgmfVbBcxxtuDjT?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:** SpecterOps will shift content to target CISOs (budget holders) over practitioners.](https://fathom.video/share/h4vxyzK8u2zrHXAscHgmfVbBcxxtuDjT?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
      - [**Why:** Aligns with a key 2025 initiative and may simplify calibration by focusing on higher-level content.](https://fathom.video/share/h4vxyzK8u2zrHXAscHgmfVbBcxxtuDjT?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
  - [**GrowthX Context:** The IDDR blog was a very early draft. GrowthX can adjust its pipeline with more artifacts to better capture SpecterOps' unique point of view.](https://fathom.video/share/h4vxyzK8u2zrHXAscHgmfVbBcxxtuDjT?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Andi (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/h4vxyzK8u2zrHXAscHgmfVbBcxxtuDjT?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
      - [Discuss extended calibration and pricing tiers with the Head of Rev Ops.](https://fathom.video/share/h4vxyzK8u2zrHXAscHgmfVbBcxxtuDjT?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
      - [Provide SpecterOps with current project documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/h4vxyzK8u2zrHXAscHgmfVbBcxxtuDjT?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
  - [**Meshach (SpecterOps):**](https://fathom.video/share/h4vxyzK8u2zrHXAscHgmfVbBcxxtuDjT?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
      - [Work with Luke (Director of PMM) to secure dedicated team bandwidth for calibration.](https://fathom.video/share/h4vxyzK8u2zrHXAscHgmfVbBcxxtuDjT?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
